<Badge text="improve-codebase-architecture" variant="note" /> <Badge text="17 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Curated" variant="note" /> <Badge text="install-now-after-trust-gate" variant="default" />

> Product-engineering workflow skills beyond the curated `obsidian-vault` row.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add mattpocock/skills --skill grill-me --skill tdd --skill to-prd --skill improve-codebase-architecture -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/improve-codebase-architecture`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from authoring SSOT `docs/src/authoring/skills/improve-codebase-architecture.mdx` and `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json` by `wagents docs generate`.
 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add mattpocock/skills --skill grill-me --skill tdd --skill to-prd --skill improve-codebase-architecture -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Product-engineering workflow skills beyond the curated `obsidian-vault` row.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

From mattpocock/skills (MIT, 131k stars, respected TS educator Matt Pocock). Engineering: find deepening opportunities, informed by CONTEXT.md/ADRs; rescue ball-of-mud codebases. Run periodically. Part of composable engineering/productivity skills for real (non-vibe) engineering with agents. Setup skill recommended first. Small, adaptable, feedback-loop focused.

## Install Prerequisites

npx skills add mattpocock/skills --skill improve-codebase-architecture -y -g -a [agents]; often with setup-matt-pocock-skills; status=install-now-after-trust-gate.

## Upstream Maintainer

[mattpocock/skills](https://github.com/mattpocock/skills) (MIT, very popular).

## Comparable Alternatives

GSD/BMAD process skills; other TDD/arch skills; kepano for obsidian.

&gt; Evidence from public GitHub (official + community 2026) + catalog; research evidence, not authority/endorsement.
